global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with a grid layout showcasing gameplay elements.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to join the game with a promotional offer.

elements.label: Blue geometric background
elements.description: A vibrant blue background with geometric shapes creating a dynamic visual effect.

elements.label: Game grid layout
elements.description: A grid layout showing four empty squares with a right arrow, suggesting a gameplay interface.

elements.label: Gameplay icon
elements.description: A simple icon representing gameplay, possibly a placeholder for game elements.

elements.description: A small right arrow icon indicating navigation or progression.

elements.label: Join the arena text
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Join the arena' prominently displayed in the center.

elements.label: No ads text
elements.description: Smaller white text below the main message stating 'No ads in first week'.

elements.label: PixelForge logo
elements.description: A simple logo at the top left corner, featuring the text 'PixelForge' in a modern font.

elements.label: Shop now button
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom with the text 'Shop now' encouraging user action.

elements.label: Decorative element

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, rewarded_video, modern and playful, key elements include gameplay icons and promotional text.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is positioned at the top left, the main message is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
